originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1.0"> <dict> <key>CFBundleExecutable</key> <string>MissionStrike</string> <key>CFBundleIdentifier</key> <string>com.vibecoded.missionstrike</string> <key>CFBundleName</key> <string>MissionStrike</string> <key>CFBundleIconFile</key> <string>AppIcon.icns</string> <key>CFBundleVersion</key> <string>2.3.0</string> <key>CFBundleShortVersionString</key> <string>2.3.0</string> <key>LSUIElement</key> <true/> <key>LSMinimumSystemVersion</key> <string>14.0</string> </dict> </plist>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1.0"> <dict> <key>CFBundleExecutable</key> <string>MissionStrike</string> <key>CFBundleIdentifier</key> <string>com.vibecoded.missionstrike</string> <key>CFBundleName</key> <string>MissionStrike</string> <key>CFBundleIconFile</key> <string>AppIcon.icns</string> <key>CFBundleVersion</key> <string>2.4.0</string> <key>CFBundleShortVersionString</key> <string>2.4.0</string> <key>LSUIElement</key> <true/> <key>LSMinimumSystemVersion</key> <string>14.0</string> </dict> </plist>
